message:
feat(engine): thread declassification_route_ref through flow lattice events and clean up retired IFC artifacts

Flow lattice (flow_lattice.rs):
- Add declassification_route_ref field to FlowLatticeEvent for full
  audit traceability of which route was used for each declassification
- Thread the new field through all 7 call sites of
  emit_event_with_metadata: check_flow (3 sites), use_declassification,
  use_declassification_with_receipt, emit_receipt_blocked_event, and
  the plain emit_event fallback
- Update assert_last_blocked_receipt_event test helper to verify the
  new field
- Update 14 test assertions to check declassification_route_ref
- Update FlowLatticeEvent serde tests to include the new field and
  verify skip_serializing_if behavior

IFC declassification runtime tests:
- Add declassification_route_ref field to 4 more obligation
  construction sites

Other test refinements:
- escape_analysis_certificate: rename test for clarity
- gc_pause_enrichment_integration: minor update
- polymorphic_inline_cache_enrichment_integration: refactored assertions
- ifc_release_gate / run_ifc_release_gate.sh: minor cleanups
- seqlock_rollout_guard: minor update

IFC release gate artifact cleanup:
- Remove 5 old timestamped run directories under
  artifacts/ifc_release_gate/ (Feb 22 runs) that belong to the
  now-retired standalone IFC release gate

Beads tracker: sync issue state

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -27,12 +27,12 @@ policy_id="policy-ifc-release-gate-v1"
 mkdir -p "$logs_dir"
 mkdir -p "$ifc_output_root"
 
-if ! command -v rch >/dev/null 2>&1; then
-  echo "rch is required for IFC release gate heavy commands" >&2
-  exit 2
-fi
-
 run_rch() {
+  if ! command -v rch >/dev/null 2>&1; then
+    echo "rch is required for IFC release gate heavy commands" >&2
+    return 2
+  fi
+
   timeout "${rch_timeout_seconds}" \
     rch exec -q -- env "RUSTUP_TOOLCHAIN=${toolchain}" "CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${target_dir}" "$@"
 }
